Delhi College of Art Entrance Examinatio.note: Admission via merit list of qualified candidates (roll numbers/marks); no college-branch-category rank or percentile cutoff table is published. Single college, so no college-wise cutoffs exist.

English and Foreign Languages University.note: EFLU publishes only candidate merit/selection lists for the entrance test; the admissions2025 page returns 404 and no college-branch-category rank/cutoff table exists for the Pashto/Persian programs.

Goa Common Entrance Test.note: No college-wise cutoff/rank table found. DTE Goa admissions page returns 404; portals (careers360) only link to PDFs with no on-page rank tables; Goa engineering admission has moved to JEE Main.

Goa Common Entrance Test – Engineering.note: GCET engineering discontinued; B.E. admission now uses JEE Main + 10+2. No college-wise opening/closing rank or percentile table available on fetched pages (only links to PDFs).

Goa Polytechnic Entrance Examination.note: Goa diploma/polytechnic admission is merit-cum-choice based on SSC (Class 10) marks via a merit list, not a college-branch rank cutoff. No college-wise cutoff table published; DTE page 404.

Gujarat Common Entrance Test – Polytechn.note: College(institute)-wise, branch-wise, category-wise merit-rank cutoffs for Gujarat Diploma Engineering (First Year) admission by ACPDC, Round 1, Admission Year 2023-24. Source: CollegeDekho-hosted official ACPDC cutoff PDF, parsed with pdfplumber. Closing Rank = category merit rank (last admitted); merit marks placed in Cutoff Percentile/Score. 1254 rows available; capped to 300 prioritizing category breadth across 142 institutes.
